# CHANGELOG

## SentinelTwin — Version History

---

## [4.4.0] — 2026-05-19

### 🚀 Final Hardening — Operationally Complete

This release closes all remaining operational gaps. SentinelTwin is now fully
production-ready with event streaming, complete maintenance lifecycle, and
comprehensive health monitoring.

#### Kafka Event Streaming
- **New:** `services/kafka_producer.py` — async Kafka producer with 4 topics
- Topics: `sentineltwin.anomalies`, `sentineltwin.ecam`, `sentineltwin.dispatch`, `sentineltwin.hashchain`
- Graceful fallback — operates without Kafka, all engine functions continue
- Internal async queue (5000 max) with gzip compression
- Wired into `sensor_engine.py` (publishes anomalies > 0.6 score)
- Wired into `ecam_engine.py` (publishes new advisories)
- Lifecycle managed in `main.py` lifespan (start/stop)

#### Maintenance Action CRUD
- **Replaced:** `api/routes/maintenance.py` — full CRUD lifecycle
- `POST /actions` — create action (RBAC: admin, engineer, qa_inspector)
- `GET /actions` — list with optional status/ATA filters
- `PATCH /actions/{id}` — update status, assignment, notes
- `DELETE /actions/{id}` — admin-only deletion
- `GET /summary` — aggregate counts
- Persistence service integration for DB write-through

#### Frontend Maintenance Form
- **New:** Inline action creation form in MaintenancePanel
- `+ NEW ACTION` toggle button
- Fields: title, priority (IMMEDIATE/URGENT/ROUTINE/DEFERRED), system, description
- POST to `/api/v1/maintenance/actions` with Bearer token
- Created actions prepend to panel list instantly
- `INPUT_STYLE` constant for consistent form styling

#### Detailed Health Endpoint
- **New:** `GET /health/detailed` — 10-subsystem diagnostic probe
- Checks: sensor_engine, ai_engine, ecam_engine, digital_twin, hash_chain, security_engine, arinc_service, afdx_service, persistence, kafka
- Reports subsystem status (UP/ERROR/NOT_INITIALIZED)
- Includes WebSocket stats and compliance flags
- Suitable for Kubernetes readiness probes

#### README Rewrite
- Complete production README with architecture diagram
- Three-column layout (Frontend | Backend | Infrastructure)
- Full API reference, Kafka topics, maintenance CRUD documentation
- Smoke test matrix (10 checks)
- Updated compliance table

---

## [4.3.1] — 2026-05-19

### 🔧 UI Performance & Live Data Integration

#### SensorMatrix Virtualization
- Replaced full DOM render (8,192 nodes) with manual virtualization
- Uses `scrollTop` tracking and `ROW_HEIGHT` / `VISIBLE_ROWS` constants
- Renders only ~40 visible rows at a time
- Eliminates browser freeze on first render

#### Panel API Integration
- **FleetPanel:** Connected to `/api/v1/fleet/status` with `FLEET_FALLBACK`
- **MaintenancePanel:** Connected to `/api/v1/maintenance/actions` with `MAINTENANCE_FALLBACK`
- **NeuralNetworkPanel:** Wired to `useSentinelStore` for live AI model metadata

#### Startup Script Completion
- `start_sentineltwin.sh`: Added automated TLS certificate generation (OpenSSL RSA 2048)
- Frontend orchestration: `npm install` + Vite dev server on port 5173
- Health checking via `curl` with retry loop
- Updated exit trap for clean frontend process shutdown

#### Extended Smoke Tests
- Tests 6-10 added to `_smoke_test.py`:
  - WebSocket connection + frame validation
  - PDF report endpoint + `%PDF` header check
  - ARINC 429 `/frame` label decoding
  - AFDX `/vls` virtual link enumeration
  - Prometheus `/metrics` liveness
- Authentication flow for protected endpoints
- Clear separation: offline unit tests → network integration tests

---

## [4.3.0] — 2026-05-18

### 🚀 Production Operationalization Sprint

Largest single release — 10 priority items covering new services, enhanced
voter logic, multi-aircraft support, frontend expansion, and infrastructure.

#### New Backend Services (5 files)

| Service | File | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| ARINC 429 Simulator | `services/arinc429_service.py` | Full 32-bit word encoding/decoding, 11 Airbus labels, fault injection |
| AFDX Monitor | `services/afdx_service.py` | 5 virtual links, BAG enforcement, jitter tracking, timing fault injection |
| Cybersecurity Engine | `services/security_engine.py` | Rate limiter, replay detection, 4-method spoof detection, threat scoring |
| Persistence Service | `services/persistence_service.py` | Async write-batching via `asyncio.Queue` workers |
| Report Generator | `services/report_service.py` | ReportLab PDF: 6-page reports with SHA-256 document hashing |

#### Enhanced Components
- **RedundancyVoter (2oo3):** ATA-specific tolerance bands, Byzantine fault detection
- **Multi-Aircraft Profiles:** 7 aircraft types (A220–A350), dynamic sensor registry
- **WebSocket Broadcast:** 10 channels (added arinc, afdx, cyber)

#### Frontend Expansion
- 12 → 18 panels
- Zustand store: 6 new TypeScript interfaces, 9 store fields, 3 WS handlers

#### Infrastructure
- Prometheus `/metrics` endpoint with counters, histograms, gauges
- `_smoke_test.py` — validates all 8 service categories

---

## [4.2.1] — 2026-05-13

### 🏗️ Module Decomposition

Monolithic backend decomposed into proper Python packages:
- `security.py` (500+ lines) → `core/database.py`, `core/redis_client.py`, `core/logger.py`, `middleware/security.py`
- `core_services.py` (650+ lines) → `services/digital_twin.py`, `services/ecam_engine.py`, `services/hash_service.py`
- `routes.py` (1000+ lines) → 14 individual route modules in `api/routes/`

### Bug Fixes
- CORS_ORIGINS JSON parse error (Pydantic v2 format)
- Sensor count mismatch (9,184 → 8,192)
- MutableHeaders.pop() AttributeError
- File watcher infinite reload loop
- Python not found on Windows (use `py -3`)

### New Features
- WebSocket broadcast engine with channel subscriptions
- ECAM advisory engine (standalone, 21 rules)
- Graceful infrastructure fallback (runs without DB/Redis)
- Frontend bootstrapping (index.html, main.jsx, vite.config.ts)
